chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 94 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 This reference is pending since 2014 without any progress. Order sheet demonstrates numerous instances where the applicant has remained absent and even notice has been repeated to the applicant to ensure representation. Be that as it may, the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification; therefore, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. Vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
